comparisons.difference: L0 accepts Warning ingestion from external systems — validates SourceRef dedup, inserts Warning with Status=New, attaches typed WarningFields and WarningRecipients. GreenAI has no create endpoint, no Warning entity, no ingestion pipeline.
comparisons.impact: External systems (municipalities, utilities) cannot push alert events into GreenAI. The entire Warnings domain is inoperable.
comparisons.action: Implement CreateWarning slice: validate ProfileId + WarningTypeId scope, insert Warning row, attach fields and recipients

comparisons.difference: L0 returns historical Warning records filtered by ProfileId + date range, including Status for audit trail. GreenAI has no Warning query endpoint.
comparisons.impact: Operators cannot view warning history or current processing status. No audit trail available.
comparisons.action: Implement ListWarnings slice filtered by ProfileId + date range

comparisons.difference: L0 exposes WarningTypes scoped to a profile, optionally filtered by ProfileRoleName. GreenAI has no WarningType read endpoint.
comparisons.impact: UI cannot present available alert categories to operators. Profile-role access restrictions cannot be enforced.
comparisons.action: Implement GetWarningTypes slice — join WarningTypes with ProfileRoleMappings, filter by optional ProfileRoleName

comparisons.difference: L0 binds (ProfileId + WarningTypeId) to a MessageTemplate via WarningTemplates — full CRUD. GreenAI has no WarningTemplate entity or management endpoints.
comparisons.impact: Without template binding, the processing pipeline cannot determine which broadcast template to use for each alert type. Warnings cannot be sent.
comparisons.action: Implement full CRUD for WarningTemplates: GetByProfile, GetByProfileAndType, Insert, Update, Delete

comparisons.difference: L0 stores per-profile Warning configuration (night-time postponement windows, default recipient strategy) in WarningProfileSettings. GreenAI has no settings entity or management endpoints.
comparisons.impact: Postponement logic cannot be configured. Default recipient strategy is undefined. Processing pipeline lacks required configuration context.

comparisons.difference: L0 resolves phone/email recipients via three strategies: KVHX address lookup, StandardReceiver/Group, and explicit numbers — driven by strategy flags per Warning. GreenAI has no recipient resolution logic.
comparisons.impact: Even if warnings are created, they cannot be delivered to anyone. Broadcasts cannot be created without resolved recipients.
comparisons.action: Implement recipient resolution service: evaluate ShouldSendToAddress/Owner/IncludedNumber flags, resolve via Lookup domain, enrich WarningMessageDto

comparisons.difference: L0 merges WarningFields (key/value pairs from external source) into the WarningTemplate body at send time. GreenAI has no field merge mechanism for Warnings.
comparisons.impact: Broadcast messages cannot be personalized with incident-specific data (location, time, severity). Recipients receive generic or incomplete messages.
comparisons.action: Implement WarningField attachment and template merge at broadcast creation time

comparisons.difference: L0 manages full Warning lifecycle: New(0)→InProgress(4)→FirstRetry(1)→InProgressFirstRetry(5)→SecondRetry(2)→Done(10)/Failed(3), plus Postponed(7/9) for night-time holds. GreenAI has no Warning entity or state transitions.
comparisons.impact: No retry logic. Failed deliveries are silently lost. No audit trail of processing attempts. Postponement (night-time hold) impossible.
comparisons.action: Implement WarningStatus enum and state transition logic in the processing pipeline

comparisons.difference: L0 detects Warnings with no resolvable recipients and sends an admin notification email. GreenAI has no no-recipient detection or notification.
comparisons.impact: Silent failure when no recipients found — operators are not notified. Workaround: manual log inspection.
comparisons.action: Implement NoRecipient detection in processing pipeline and admin email notification

comparisons.difference: L0 runs a batch processing engine: re-queues postponed warnings, loads unprocessed warnings in chunks, resolves recipients, merges fields, creates broadcasts, writes status transitions. GreenAI has no processing pipeline for Warnings.
comparisons.impact: Warnings are accepted but never processed or delivered. The domain is a dead end without the processing pipeline.
comparisons.action: Implement WarningWorkload processor as a background job: load→resolve→merge→broadcast→status-write cycle

summary: GreenAI has zero Warnings implementation. All 10 L0 capabilities are absent. The 5 CRITICAL gaps (create, template management, recipient resolution, state machine, processing pipeline) form the minimum viable core — without these, the domain cannot function at all. The 4 HIGH gaps (list history, type management, profile settings, field merging) are required for operator usability and correct broadcast personalisation.
